response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned senior generalist with strong testing discipline, GIS platform experience (GISCollective), and some low-latency systems work in DLang at Sociomantic. However, the role requires modern C++ or Rust as primary skills, and the resume shows only a brief C/C++ stint at National Instruments over a decade ago (2014-2015) with no recent C++/Rust work. No demonstrated experience with routing tiles, navigation guidance, or large-scale geospatial pipelines specifically. Worth a screening call only if the team is open to a strong generalist who would need to ramp up significantly on C++/Rust.
strengths: Geospatial domain exposure via GISCollective platform and Green Map work
Low-latency distributed systems experience at Sociomantic (millions of req/s)
Strong engineering craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, testing tools authorship
concerns: No recent modern C++ experience; last C/C++ role was ~2015 at NI
No Rust experience listed anywhere on the resume
No navigation/routing tiles or production map pipeline experience
